The recruits gather around and offer congratulations to those promoted. As the boys pass a celebratory wineskin around, Jon notices [Sam](wiki:Samwell_Tarly) standing by himself and goes over to him....
The promoted boys are treated to a marvelous feast that night to celebrate. The group discusses and jokes about their assignments: [ranger](wiki:Ranger), [builder](wiki:Builder), woodsman,...
As he rides Jon thinks about the world outside the [Night's Watch](wiki:Night's_Watch) and reminds himself that he has not yet sworn his vow. He thinks of all the places he has wanted to travel to...
